add        Installs a pfx certificate to selected store.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Installs a pfx certificate to selected store.

options.name: --store-name
options.description:
(Default: My) Certificate store name (My, Root, etc.).
See
'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreNa
me' for more information.

options.name: --store-location
options.description:
(Default: CurrentUser) Certificate store location
(CurrentUser, LocalMachine, etc.). See
'System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.StoreLo
cation' for more information.
